reason: The example-writer (60) wrote a sentence for the wrong homograph — the NOUN 'fint' (a feint): 'Spelaren gjorde en fin fint och rundade motståndaren.' This card is the ADVERB fint = 'nicely, finely' (the noun reading was already corrected in layer 20-pos). Replace with an unambiguously adverbial example.

The base example 'för kännedom' is a bare set-phrase fragment, not a sentence, and doesn't show the word's core meaning. Give two short full sentences: one for the main sense (knowledge/awareness of something — the collocation 'ha kännedom om'), and one that keeps the idiom 'för kännedom' (= for your information / FYI).
examples: Hon har god kännedom om svensk historia.
Jag skickar dig rapporten för kännedom.
